mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, league_set_id AS leagueSetId, league_slot AS leagueSlot FROM deck WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, league_set_id AS leagueSetId, league_slot AS leagueSlot FROM deck WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND league_set_id IS NULL ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, league_set_id AS leagueSetId, league_slot AS leagueSlot FROM deck WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id FROM deck WHERE league_set_id = #{leagueSetId} AND league_slot = #{slot}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deck (user_id, name, league_set_id, league_slot) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{leagueSetId}, #{leagueSlot})
mapper.update: UPDATE deck SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM deck WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
